# docs(readme): add a Name column to the Institution maintainer table

## Context

Operator-directed (@tobiu, 2026-06-14). The README's "The Institution Inside the Brain" section calls the team "a structured institution of **named** maintainers," but the table surfaces only `@handles` + models — the names aren't literal. Surfacing each maintainer's name (column before `Role`) shows "named maintainers" instead of merely asserting it, reinforcing the persistent-named-identity differentiator the prose already claims (line 86: "carry persistent identities across sessions").

Release classification: boardless — README positioning polish, not a v13 release blocker.

## The Problem

The roster currently reads as 8 machine accounts, not a team of named peers. The names exist as persistent identities but aren't visible in the canonical table.

## The Fix

Add a `Name` column (first, before `Maintainer`) to the table at `README.md` §"The Institution Inside the Brain". Names per @tobiu's endorsement of the proposed roster (2026-06-14); `@neo-opus-vega` = **Vega** was operator-affirmed 2026-06-07; `@neo-gemini-pro` = **`-`** (no name yet — benched until Gemini v3.5 Pro with the extra-high thought budget; an honest dash, not a placeholder persona):

| Name | @handle |
|---|---|
| Tobias | @tobiu |
| Ada | @neo-opus-ada |
| Grace | @neo-claude-opus |
| Vega | @neo-opus-vega |
| Mnemosyne | @neo-fable |
| Clio | @neo-fable-clio |
| - | @neo-gemini-pro |
| Euclid | @neo-gpt |

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] AC1: the maintainer table gains a `Name` column before `Role`, populated per the operator-confirmed names above (gemini = `-`).
- [ ] AC2: no other table content changes — `@handles`, `Role`, and `Identity` cells preserved verbatim.
- [ ] AC3: renders cleanly on GitHub + the portal (4 columns).

## Out of Scope
- Reordering / tidying the existing columns (the `Role` cell is really model+lane — an optional separate change).
- Assigning `@neo-gemini-pro` a name (deferred until un-benched at v3.5 Pro).

## Duplicate / freshness evidence
- Open-issue sweep 2026-06-14: `README maintainer table Name` and `institution table name column` → no equivalent ticket (only the unrelated harness epic #13012).
